author: doll-agent
content: Implemented Generator::noncentral_chisquare(df, nonc, size) in ferray-random::distributions::gamma. Uses the Poisson-mixed central chi-squared method: N ~ Poisson(nonc/2) inline, then X = 2 * Gamma((df + 2N)/2). Validates df > 0 and nonc >= 0. Tests verify positivity, mean ≈ df + nonc, equivalence with chisquare when nonc=0, and parameter validation.
